title: FULL WRAPAROUND SERVICES - 211info
text: COMMUNITY RECOVERY AND WELLNESS LIVING FULL WRAPAROUND SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides case management services to help connect people with services and resources that help with housing, homelessness, food, meal assistance, clothing and essentials, medical care, mental health services, drug and alcohol counseling, and peer support. 853 Medical Center Drive NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Friday 10am-noon and 1:30pm-5pm Email (971) 443-4176 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (971) 443-4176 Main phone Main phone (971) 443-4176 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Marion County Services: Case/Care Management Housing Search Assistance Peer Mental Health Support Services Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD AND CLOTHING BANK If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
